tagline: Dance defiantly through Cairo's night in this glossy anthem.
liner: Step into a soundscape where deep 808 bass meets traditional oud and ney flute, crafting a dark yet glossy world. This polished Egyptian pop track at 104 BPM transforms city struggles into rhythmic defiance. Smooth vocal duets layer over rhythmic Arabic chants like 'heyya' and 'yalla,' building from minor key verses to soaring choruses. Here, music becomes protection for the soul against fear and division. From rooftops to the river's edge, millions of hearts beat with fire in their name. It is a cinematic celebration where dance acts as unity, proving that love finds a way even when the sky turns gray.
worldCaption: Cairo nights blend deep sub bass with traditional ouds and ney flutes for a dark, glossy soundscape celebrating resilience, pride, and colle

bios.lead: Sings smooth R&B lines that glide over the track's heavy rhythm.
bios.back: Harmonizes in thick layers to fill every gap between notes.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking with crisp club beats and tight timing.
bios.perc: Pounds traditional rhythms on darbuka that drive the dance energy forward.
bios.bass: Rumbles deep sub frequencies that anchor the entire glossy arrangement.
bios.synth: Weaves atmospheric textures to bridge modern electronics with heritage sounds.
bios.other: Scatters ambient details that add depth without cluttering the mix.
